zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Joinville於1092年出生時，他的父親Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny30歲，母親Hodierne de Courtenay30歲。他於1110年與Aldéarde de Vignory結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1137年在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Joinville was born in 1092, his father, Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny, was 30 and his mother, Hodierne de Courtenay, was 30. He married Aldéarde de Vignory in 1110. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1137, in Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Joinville est né en 1092, son père, Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Hodierne de Courtenay, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Aldéarde de Vignory en 1110. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1137, à Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Joinville 1092 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny 30 und seine Mutter Hodierne de Courtenay 30. Er hat 1110 Aldéarde de Vignory geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1137 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Joinville è nato il nel 1092, il suo padre, Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Hodierne de Courtenay, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Aldéarde de Vignory nel 1110. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1137, nel Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Joinvilleが1092年に生まれた時，父Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joignyは30歳，母Hodierne de Courtenayは30歳であった。1110年にAldéarde de Vignoryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1137年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Joinville(이)가 1092년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Hodierne de Courtenay(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1110년 Aldéarde de Vignory(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1137년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Joinville nasceu em 1092, seu pai, Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Hodierne de Courtenay, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Aldéarde de Vignory em 1110. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1137, em Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Joinville родился в 1092 г., его отцу по имени Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Hodierne de Courtenay, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Aldéarde de Vignory в 1110 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1137 г. в местности арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Joinville nació en 1092, su papá, Geoffroy de Joinville II  Comte de Joigny, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Hodierne de Courtenay, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Aldéarde de Vignory en 1110. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1137, en Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 45 años.
